hero.title: Knowledge – The Key to the Future
hero.subtitle: At School No. 33
hero.description: Our school provides students with modern education, moral upbringing, and a solid foundation to strive toward great goals.

about.title: About the School
about.description1: School No. 33 is a place of knowledge and values for the younger generation. Our goal is to provide students with modern education and nurture independent, patriotic, and goal-oriented youth.
about.description2: Our school has experienced teachers, modern classrooms, sports halls, and various clubs. Every student has great opportunities to discover and develop their talents.
